project.name: ParkTek Landing Page Content Spec
project.goal: Rewrite and restructure parktek.in landing page content to feel premium and globally positioned, taking structural inspiration from smartparking.com/uk while staying faithful to ParkTek's current feature set and solutions.

stack_context.target_stack: React + Next.js (App Router) + Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui
stack_context.note: This JSON contains content + information architecture only. No design guidance included.

brand_voice.positioning: Operator-first parking operations platform that delivers outcomes (control, compliance, throughput, visibility) rather than a hardware feature flyer.

core_product_pillars_from_current_site.label: ANPR Access
core_product_pillars_from_current_site.description: AI-powered license plate recognition for access decisions

core_product_pillars_from_current_site.label: Valet Assist
core_product_pillars_from_current_site.description: Real-time tracking and seamless customer experience for valet operations

system_module_controller.label: The Controller
system_module_controller.description: AI-enabled smart brain connecting and orchestrating system components and device data flows in real-time.

operational_outcomes_claimed: Reduced manual effort and labour cost

sections.headline: Parking operations, under control.
sections.subhead: ParkTek is an integrated access-control and parking management system—built for high-throughput sites that need reliability, compliance, and real-time visibility across every entry and exit.
bullets: Reduce congestion and manual intervention at gates
Prevent misuse with verified access and automated enforcement logic
See occupancy, usage trends, and exceptions in one dashboard

trust_strip_placeholder.note: Logos/brands optional; only include if real and approved.

sections.headline: Designed for continuous operations where downtime is not an option.
sections.integrity_note: If any metric cannot be defended publicly, replace with verifiable metrics (e.g., sites deployed, monthly vehicle events processed) or remove.

sections.headline: Solutions for every parking environment.
sections.intro: Pick the model that matches your site complexity and traffic profile.

cards.label: Enterprise & Campus Access
cards.copy: Streamline entry/exit, manage permits at scale, and keep operations predictable—without adding headcount.
bullets: Access Controller for verified vehicle entry
Occupancy monitoring for live availability signals
Operations dashboard for audit trails and exceptions
POS support where paid access is required
mapped_from_current: Corporate solutions: Access Controller, Occupancy Monitoring, Web Dashboard, POS Device

cards.label: Residential Communities
cards.copy: A resident-first access system that reduces disputes, improves security, and keeps visitor flows smooth.
bullets: Mobile app access for residents and visitors
mapped_from_current: Society solutions: Enhanced Security, Resident Management, Mobile App Access, 24/7 Monitoring

cards.label: Retail & Mixed-Use Destinations
cards.copy: Keep queues down, increase turnover, and give customers a smoother arrival and exit experience.
bullets: Multiple payment options via POS integration
mapped_from_current: Mall & Commercial solutions: Smart Navigation, Digital Ticketing, Multiple Payment Options, Analytics Dashboard

sections.headline: A smarter way to manage parking.
sections.intro: ParkTek is built to deliver operator outcomes, not just hardware installation.
outcome_bullets: Introduce flexible payment and access policies
Improve safety with better-controlled entry points
Make decisions using reliable reporting and trend insights
sections.inspiration_note: Outcome framing inspired by Smart Parking industry pages; keep outcomes accurate to ParkTek capabilities.

sections.headline: One system. Every component in sync.
sections.subhead: The Controller orchestrates devices and data flows so your site behaves predictably—even at peak load.

primary_block.label: The Controller
key_points: AI-enabled smart brain of the system
Connects gates, cameras, POS, and dashboards into one operational layer

sections.secondary_note: Also supports boom barriers and mobile app flows.

sections.headline: Capabilities that scale with your site.

items.label: ANPR Access
items.description: Automated plate recognition for entry/exit decisions

items.label: Vehicle Registry
items.description: Structured vehicle database for permits and identity

items.label: Fleet & Shared Parking
items.description: Manage fleet movements and shared access policies

items.label: Payments & POS
items.description: Seamless payment processing and exit enablement

items.label: Command Dashboard
items.description: Real-time monitoring, analytics, and audit trails

steps.title: Site assessment & integration plan
steps.detail: Map entry/exit points, traffic patterns, device integration requirements, and operating policies.

steps.title: Install & commissioning
steps.detail: Install hardware and configure system components; validate flows end-to-end.

steps.title: Go-live with monitoring + optimisation
steps.detail: Launch with operational monitoring and tune policies based on real-world usage.

sections.headline: Results operators care about.
sections.intro: Use real deployments, pilots, or measurable improvements. Do not publish fabricated testimonials.

cards.title: Reduced queue times at peak
cards.notes: Replace with real metric (e.g., average wait time reduced by X%).

cards.title: Fewer unauthorised entries and disputes
cards.notes: Replace with real metric (e.g., unauthorised entries reduced by X%).

cards.title: Clear reporting for audits and billing
cards.notes: Replace with real metric (e.g., reconciliation time reduced by X%).

items.a: ParkTek supports boom barriers, ANPR systems, POS devices, a web dashboard, and mobile app flows—configured to match your site layout and operating model.

items.q: How does ParkTek reduce operational overhead?
items.a: By automating entry/exit decisions, improving traffic flow, enabling real-time monitoring, and supporting automated billing and payments—reducing manual intervention and day-to-day friction.

items.q: Can ParkTek scale from small sites to multi-site operations?
items.a: Yes. ParkTek is designed to scale from smaller locations to high-throughput, multi-site operations with configurable policies and centralized visibility.

items.q: What support model do you provide?
items.a: Installation and commissioning, 24/7 support, preventive maintenance, training, and regular updates/upgrades.

sections.headline: Ready to bring parking operations under control?
sections.subhead: Book a demo and we’ll map ParkTek to your site layout, traffic patterns, and policy needs.

contact_section_placeholder.note: Use real and current contact info from ParkTek.

integrity_rules: Do not fabricate testimonials or client logos.
Avoid publishing metrics that cannot be defended publicly.
Keep language outcome-led and globally neutral.
